properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v6 v7

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: More than any eye has seen A never-ending mystery Closer than the air we breathe There's no one like You God There's no one like You God

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Author of the universe Stretched out the sky with just a word None can know Your matchless worth There's no one like You God There's no one like You God

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Almighty, stand alone Forever to You belong All our praise, all our praise

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: No greater love no higher Name Is strong enough to crush the grave Your kingdom will forever reign There's no one like You God There's no one like You God

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Almighty, stand alone Forever to You belong All our praise, all our praise Your glory beyond compare All heaven and earth declare You are great, You are great Eternal God

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: All praise and honor Glory and power To You Eternal God Who was and is to come The Everlasting One You are Eternal God

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Almighty, stand alone Forever to You belong All our praise, all our praise, yeah Your glory beyond compare All heaven and earth declare You are great, You are great You are great, You are great Eternal God, Eternal God
